param.name: input_path
param.label: Cleaned protein structure
param.help: Input cleaned protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.

param.name: input_fasta
param.label: Cleaned protein sequence
param.help: Input cleaned protein sequence file in FASTA format.

param.name: input_msa
param.label: Multiple sequence alignment
param.help: Input MSA file in Stockholm, aligned FASTA, or A3M format. The first sequence must match the query sequence.

param.name: substrate_names
param.label: Substrate names or SMILES
param.help: Substrate names or SMILES strings separated by ';'.

param.name: no_add_h
param.label: Disable hydrogen addition
param.help: Disable hydrogen addition using OpenMM. By default, hydrogens are added.

param.name: ph
param.label: pH
param.help: pH value used for hydrogen addition. Default: 7.0. Valid range: 0.0 to 14.0.

param.name: no_minimize_energy
param.label: Disable energy minimization
param.help: Disable energy minimization before energy evaluation. By default, energy minimization is enabled.

param.name: minimization_iteration
param.label: Energy minimization iterations
param.help: Maximum number of iterations for energy minimization. Default: 1000.

param.name: hydrocluster_cutoff
param.label: Hydrophobic cluster cutoff
param.help: Minimum contact area cutoff for hydrophobic cluster residue-residue connection. Default: 10.0.

param.name: flexibility_cutoff
param.label: Flexibility distance cutoff
param.help: Distance cutoff used to determine residue-residue connections in ProDy. Default: 15.0.

param.name: flexibility_n_modes
param.label: Number of normal modes
param.help: Number of low-frequency normal modes used for RMSF calculation. Default: 20.

param.name: disorder_window_size
param.label: Disorder window size
param.help: Sliding window size for FoldIndex-like disorder score calculation. Default: 11.

param.name: disorder_min_region_length
param.label: Minimum disordered region length
param.help: Minimum number of consecutive residues required to define a disordered region. Default: 5.

param.name: strict
param.label: Strict mode
param.help: Enable strict mode requiring all report types.
